seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Port Arthur and Port Augusta West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Port Arthur vs Port Augusta West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Port Arthur and Port Augusta West.
heading: Port Arthur vs Port Augusta West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Port Arthur, South Australia and Port Augusta West, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Port Augusta West has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Port Arthur (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Port Arthur or Port Augusta West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Port Arthur has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Port Augusta West scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Port Arthur scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Port Augusta West scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Port Arthur or Port Augusta West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Port Augusta West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
